allow: Bash(grep -n "StoredSummary\\|StoredTranscript\\|suggested_title\\|action_items\\|interface.*Summary\\|type StoredSummary\\|export type StoredSummary" src/lib/api.ts | head; echo "---TYPES---"; sed -n '/StoredSummary/,/^}/p' src/lib/api.ts | head -40)
